chapters.title: Accounting Equation
chapters.transcript: Assets = Liabilities + Equity. Double-entry bookkeeping. Debits and credits.

chapters.title: Financial Statements
chapters.transcript: Income statement, balance sheet, cash flow statement. How they connect.

chapters.title: Revenue Recognition
chapters.transcript: ASC 606 five-step model. Accrual vs cash accounting. Deferred revenue.

chapters.title: Inventory and COGS
chapters.transcript: FIFO, LIFO, weighted average. Periodic vs perpetual. Lower of cost or market.

chapters.title: Financial Ratios
chapters.transcript: Liquidity, solvency, profitability ratios. DuPont analysis.
